suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit mention of `noUncheckedIndexedAccess: true` in tsconfig.json as the reason non-null assertions are commonly needed in test files. Current guidance says 'Avoid non-null assertions except in tests or tightly constrained cases' but doesn't explain the specific TypeScript strict setting that necessitates this pattern.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of foundation-followup-typecheck-fixes found all 15 type fixes were non-null assertions on array access in test files (tests/helpers/mocks.ts and adapter tests). The tsconfig.json has 'noUncheckedIndexedAccess': true which makes this pattern necessary.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the convention for explicit optional parameter types in mock helper functions. The mockFeatureStore list method was updated to use 'filter?: { milestoneId?: string; status?: string }' for type consistency.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: foundation-followup-typecheck-fixes changed tests/helpers/mocks.ts line 270 from implicit optional to explicit typed optional parameter.
